message:
Remove toJSON hack, let JSON.stringify walk Proxy natively

Removing toJSON from array/object proxies and the cursor row view
lets JSON.stringify traverse the columnar getters directly instead
of materializing the full object tree first. This drops round-trip
(parse + JSON.stringify) from 8.3x to 2.8x vs native JSON.

Documents the cursor pattern in parse() JSDoc: sequential access
and JSON.stringify work correctly, but stored references share the
same cursor. Users should destructure or call materialize() when
they need independent copies.
